project.name: aethon
project.description: Aethon is a Tauri 2 + React 19 + TypeScript desktop shell that embeds the pi coding agent and renders its output as live, interactive UI via the A2UI protocol, where the agent dynamically populates the interface rather than a fixed IDE layout. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

nodes.name: a2ui-tools.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the A2UI pi-tool definitions, asserting each tool dispatches to the right runtime API method and surfaces failures correctly.

nodes.name: a2ui-tools.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the set of pi agent tools that let the model read frontend state and mutate the A2UI layout/canvas through the bound runtime API.
nodes.languageNotes: Each tool is a defineTool entry whose execute wraps the runtime API and normalizes results to JSON via shared helpers.

nodes.name: a2uiEvents.ts
nodes.summary: Routes inbound A2UI UI events to extension handlers or built-in window/canvas actions, building the per-tab pi handler context that handlers run inside.

nodes.name: active-project-cwd.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests startup cwd resolution: parsing the active project from projects.json and falling back through project root, user dir, and process cwd.

nodes.name: active-project-cwd.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves the agent's startup working directory by reading the active project/workspace from the persisted projects.json with layered fallbacks.

nodes.name: aethon-api-dashboard.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the dashboard and tasks runtime API surfaces, verifying queries round-trip through the mutation-ack channel and respect frontend readiness.

nodes.name: aethon-api-dashboard.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the dashboard and tasks subnamespaces of the agent runtime API, issuing tracked queries to the frontend for repo overview, issues, and task launches.

nodes.name: aethon-api-editor.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the editor runtime API surface, asserting open-file and reveal queries resolve the current cwd and dispatch through the mutation channel.

nodes.name: aethon-api-editor.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the editor subnamespace of the agent runtime API for opening and revealing files relative to the active tab's working directory.

nodes.name: aethon-api-sessions.test.ts
nodes.summary: Extensive tests for the sessions runtime API: summary listing, live/restored message merging, transcript rendering, and session event emission.

nodes.name: aethon-api-sessions.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the sessions runtime API: enumerates session summaries from live pi state plus mirrored frontend tabs, merges live and persisted messages, and emits session lifecycle events.
nodes.languageNotes: Merge logic dedupes live and restored messages by normalized content and id, sorting by createdAt with stable order fallback.

nodes.name: aethon-api-shells.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the shells runtime API, asserting list/read/write queries validate tab ids and arguments before dispatching to the frontend.

nodes.name: aethon-api-shells.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the shells subnamespace of the agent runtime API for opt-in listing, reading, and writing of shared shell tabs through tracked queries.

nodes.name: aethon-api-windows.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the windows runtime API: setState/canvas operations, title/focus/close, and tracking of known windows for the owning tab.

nodes.name: aethon-api-windows.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the windows subnamespace of the agent runtime API for managing detached A2UI windows: state, canvas, title, focus, close, and known-window tracking.

nodes.name: aethon-api.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the top-level aethon runtime API assembly, verifying it composes the subnamespaces and exposes layout, extension, and keybinding methods.

nodes.name: aethon-api.ts
nodes.summary: Assembles the full globalThis.aethon runtime API the agent bridge exposes to pi tools and extensions, composing layout, canvas, sessions, shells, windows, dashboard, editor, keybindings, themes, and notifications.
nodes.languageNotes: Single large factory (buildAethonApi) wiring 15 imported subsystem modules into one cohesive runtime surface.

nodes.name: agent-errors.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests agent error classification and formatting, covering usage-limit, context-length, and retryable error detection plus human-readable messages.

nodes.name: agent-errors.ts
nodes.summary: Classifies and formats agent-end errors, detecting usage-limit, context-length-exceeded, and retryable conditions and producing user-facing messages.

nodes.name: auto-switch.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests account auto-switch selection, ensuring it skips tried and rate-limited profiles and picks the next available account for a provider.

nodes.name: auto-switch.ts
nodes.summary: Selects the next available auth profile for a provider when the current account hits a usage limit, skipping already-tried candidates via a probe.

nodes.name: codex-usage.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests Codex usage parsing and fetching, validating JWT decoding and the shape of parsed rate-limit windows from the usage endpoint.

nodes.name: codex-usage.ts
nodes.summary: Fetches and parses Codex/OpenAI usage data, decoding the access-token JWT for account identity and normalizing rate-limit windows.
nodes.languageNotes: Hand-decodes the JWT payload (base64url) to extract email and account id without a crypto dependency.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel module re-exporting the auth-profiles store and manager public surface for consumers across the agent bridge.

nodes.name: manager.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the auth-profiles manager: API-key save, OAuth flows, per-tab profile application, default selection, rename/delete, and usage-limit auto-switch.

nodes.name: manager.ts
nodes.summary: Core auth-profiles manager orchestrating credential persistence, OAuth/API-key login flows, per-tab pi service registries, model switching, and usage-limit-driven account auto-switch.
nodes.languageNotes: Large stateful coordinator; OAuth start spans ~190 lines streaming login lifecycle events back to the frontend.

nodes.name: store.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests the auth-profiles store: path derivation, profile-id sanitization/safety, state load/save round-trips, and metadata upsert/delete.

nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Persistence layer for auth profiles: derives on-disk paths, sanitizes profile ids, and loads/saves profile metadata and credential files under the user dir.
nodes.languageNotes: isSafeProfileId / sanitizeProfileId form the security floor preventing path traversal in credential file names.

nodes.name: git-context.test.ts

nodes.name: git-context.ts

nodes.name: jsonPointer.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests RFC6901 JSON Pointer mutation via setAtPointer, covering token escaping, array index growth, and immutable clone-on-write semantics.

nodes.name: jsonPointer.ts

nodes.languageNotes: Copy-on-write down the pointer path keeps the root state object referentially fresh for change detection.

nodes.name: setAtPointer
nodes.summary: Immutably sets a value at an RFC6901 JSON Pointer, cloning each node on the path and growing arrays for numeric tokens.

nodes.name: summarizeLayoutStructure

nodes.name: agent_commands.rs
nodes.summary: Tauri IPC command surface for the agent subprocess: spawns/restarts the bridge, forwards chat messages and A2UI events, routes payloads to the global vs per-tab worker bridge, and reports agent diagnostics.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Module barrel for the agent supervisor, re-exporting the process state machine, stdio readers, sidecar discovery, spawn logic, and idle sweep.

nodes.name: process.rs
nodes.summary: Core agent supervisor state machine: the AgentProcesses managed state, per-worker readiness/idle tracking, payload routing (global vs tab worker), mutation-route bookkeeping, retirement, and orphaned-child cleanup.
nodes.languageNotes: Mutex-guarded shared state with lock-poisoning recovery; AsyncLocalStorage-style per-tab routing on the Rust side.

nodes.name: readers.rs
nodes.summary: Spawns the stdout/stderr reader threads for an agent bridge child, emitting agent-response Tauri events per stdout line and handling EOF cleanup with UTF-8-safe buffering.

nodes.name: sidecar.rs
nodes.summary: Resolves the project root and locates the bundled bun sidecar binary used to launch the agent bridge.

nodes.name: spawn.rs
nodes.summary: Builds and spawns agent bridge processes with project, worker, devshell, and handshake environment wiring.

nodes.name: sweep.rs
nodes.summary: Background idle-sweep task that retires idle agent workers past the configured TTL and reaps orphaned meta-less child processes.

nodes.name: backup.rs
nodes.summary: Pre-update backup and restore mechanics: copies the running .app to a versioned backup directory, prunes stale backups, and recursively copies files/dirs/symlinks for rollback.

nodes.name: detect.rs
nodes.summary: Detects the install target (the .app bundle root) from the running executable path so backup/rollback can locate what to protect.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Boot-probation module barrel and orchestration: wires backup, detection, monitoring, reporting, rollback, and the on-disk schema for the post-update rollback safety net.

nodes.name: monitor.rs
nodes.summary: Post-launch probation monitor: tracks boot stages, arms an attempt-bounded rollback timer, acknowledges a healthy boot to cancel it, and triggers rollback on timeout.

nodes.name: report.rs
nodes.summary: Builds and surfaces the post-rollback report, composing failure reasons and tailing the latest log file so the user sees why an update was rolled back.

nodes.name: rollback.rs
nodes.summary: The --boot-rollback-helper entry path: waits for the parent to exit, restores the backup, and relaunches the previous app version; includes cross-platform pid-liveness checks.
nodes.languageNotes: cfg(unix)/cfg(windows) duplicated helpers for pid-liveness and executable resolution.

nodes.name: schema.rs
nodes.summary: On-disk schema and atomic I/O for boot probation: install/probation/stage enums, the BootProbation and BootRollbackReport records, and sentinel/report path resolution with atomic JSON writes.

nodes.name: boot.rs
nodes.summary: Thin Tauri commands the frontend calls on first paint (boot_stage / boot_ok) to record boot progress and acknowledge a healthy launch, cancelling the rollback timer.

nodes.languageNotes: Two-layer defense: resolve_inside_root catches .. without disk access; canonicalization catches symlink escapes.

nodes.name: parse.ts

nodes.languageNotes: Frontmatter is regex-extracted then parsed with a YAML library; per-field coercion functions keep one malformed value from rejecting the whole file.

nodes.name: steer.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the subagent mention/steer detection helpers, covering leading @-mentions, background-intent phrases, and explicit steer-prompt construction.

nodes.languageNotes: Mention chaining handles comma/and-separated @name lists at the start of a message.

nodes.languageNotes: The fixture-heavy tests exercise both single-task and batched delegation contracts through mocked Pi tool execution.

nodes.languageNotes: The builder turns live extension, layout, theme, model, tab, and native-window state into the textual contract supplied to the agent.

nodes.name: prompt-template.ts

nodes.name: working-context.test.ts

nodes.name: utils.ts

nodes.name: terminal-stream.test.ts

nodes.languageNotes: Uses a KMP-style longest-suffix-prefix overlap to dedupe overlapping snapshot text instead of naive diffing.

nodes.name: checks.rs
nodes.summary: Tauri command module that queries GitHub CI check-run status for a branch via the gh CLI and rolls individual check conclusions up into a single pass/fail/pending verdict.

nodes.name: common.rs

nodes.languageNotes: Builds std::process::Command and tokio::process::Command read-only variants through env.rs-style resolution, with GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 propagated to child git invoked from gh.

nodes.name: diff.rs
nodes.summary: Provides per-file diff, diff-stat, hunk, and HEAD-content Tauri commands used by editor dirty gutters, file-change cards, and diff views.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust parsing code consumes stable git formats such as --numstat and -U0 hunk headers to avoid fragile UI-side diff interpretation.

nodes.name: github.rs
nodes.summary: Largest GitHub-integration module: gh-CLI commands for branch push/PR status, repository overview metadata, and avatar URL discovery, plus dangling-worktree detection that suppresses gh calls for broken worktrees.
nodes.languageNotes: Each public command delegates to a testable _inner; worktree_is_dangling/normalize_path guard against gh failures inside dangling worktrees, and url_encode_path_segment percent-encodes slash-bearing branch names before the branches API call.

nodes.name: issues.rs
nodes.summary: Tauri commands for listing open GitHub issues and viewing a single issue's detail via the gh CLI, with a pure JSON parser for the list response.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses gh issue list with an explicit limit (counted via -q length elsewhere) and parses labels/author/comments into typed serde models.

nodes.summary: Module barrel for the git command family, declaring and re-exporting the checks, common, diff, github, issues, picker, status, watch, and worktrees submodules.

nodes.name: status.rs
nodes.summary: Core git working-tree status module: branch/ahead/behind/dirty summary, per-file porcelain-z status classification, working context resolution, fetch-all with attempt reservation, and ignored-path discovery — all worktree-aware against the active root.
nodes.languageNotes: Parses porcelain=v1 --branch and porcelain=v2 -z NUL-delimited output; resolve_repo_and_active_root and path_relative_to_active_root make a workspace report its own branch and rebase paths into the active worktree.

nodes.name: test_support.rs
